behaviors.description: Generated function signature matches the expected interface from the natural-language spec (parameter names/types and return type).
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on what the real LLM emits from natural language. A mocked model or canned response can hide real signature mismatches caused by model variability or prompt sensitivity.
behaviors.test_description: Run the service with a real LLM on several interface-constrained prompts, compile/inspect the generated function signature, and assert exact match to expected name/params/types/return type.

behaviors.description: Generated implementation passes all provided tests on first or subsequent attempt.
behaviors.justification: This behavior spans multiple agentic steps (initial generation plus retry path) with state carried between attempts. Single-step tests cannot validate real recovery behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Use a real LLM and real test execution harness on tasks where first attempt may fail but retry can succeed; assert the loop continues correctly and final attempt passes within allowed retries.

behaviors.description: On test failure, refinement prompt includes failure messages from the previous run.
behaviors.justification: The failure is usually at module wiring boundaries (test runner output -> prompt builder -> next LLM call). Pure unit mocks can miss dropped/incorrectly threaded failure context.
behaviors.test_description: Wire real prompt-construction and retry orchestration modules together with a controlled failing test result; capture the second LLM request payload and assert failure messages are included verbatim/structurally.

behaviors.description: Service stops after 3 failed attempts and returns structured error containing all three attempts and their test results.
behaviors.justification: This is retry-state and error-aggregation logic across components. Unit tests of one function may miss serialization/aggregation bugs at boundaries, but real LLM behavior is not required.
behaviors.test_description: Run orchestrator with deterministic failing generation/test outcomes across attempts; assert exactly 3 attempts executed, loop terminates, and returned error object includes per-attempt code/test-result records.

behaviors.description: End-to-end loop (generate -> test -> refine -> retest) produces a working implementation for a function a single LLM call usually gets wrong.
behaviors.justification: By definition this requires sequential agentic steps with feedback-driven refinement. A single model call or mocked sequence cannot establish the real multi-step improvement behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Execute full pipeline with real LLM and real test harness on known hard prompts where one-shot baseline frequently fails; assert iterative loop succeeds and record attempt-by-attempt progression.
